text.title: MCP Client Integration — Agents, Claude Code, Host Configuration — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `mcp-client-integration`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: register-servers
step.action: Add each server (name, command, args, transport, env) to config.

step.name: launch
step.action: For stdio: spawn subprocess. For http: open SSE connection. Verify handshake.

step.name: list-tools
step.action: Call tools/list per server; collect tool schemas.

step.name: bridge
step.action: Map MCP tool schema to SDK tool schema; expose to model.

step.name: wire-consent
step.action: Gate first call per tool with consent UI; cache per-session; audit each call.
